response:
Alex began reading.
Books changed views.
First story had pages.
Twelve dozen sheets.
Four days passed.
Next tome grew larger.
One hundred eighty lines.
Six days elapsed.
Third volume stretched further.
Two hundred forty sheets.
Eight days flew by.
Daily counts match.
Thirty pages daily.
Thirty pages again.
Thirty pages once more.
Average stays steady.
Total sum equals ninety.
Three books total.
Divide sum by three.
Result is thirty.
Conservative mind shifts.
Love stories vary.
Perspectives broaden now.
No two words match letters.
Adjacent terms avoid sequence.
Unique vocabulary fills text.
Every word stands alone.
No repetition occurs here.
Thoughts evolve slowly.
Reading builds bridges.
New ideas emerge.
Old beliefs fade.
Understanding grows deep.
Thirty pages remain constant.
